phase_name: Sessions 35-37: Q_W Tautology and Operator Convergence
phase_dir: N/A - research sessions, not GSD phase

remaining_tasks.name: Formalize the strong operator convergence conjecture precisely
Read Connes-Consani-Moscovici 2023/2024 papers for program status
Attempt tail estimates in prolate basis (specific lemmas)
Hilbert-Schmidt norm bounds on incremental prime operators

blockers.description: The remaining step (strong operator convergence of prime-side Weil distribution on Sonin space) is pure analysis, not computation. This is the Connes-Consani-Moscovici program.
blockers.workaround: Can attempt specific lemmas and tail estimates, but the core theorem is a Millennium Prize problem

blockers.description: Distributional convergence of the explicit formula (unconditional) does NOT imply strong operator convergence. The gap is exactly where RH lives.
blockers.workaround: None known. PNT error O(x/log x) is too weak for naive estimates.

decisions.decision: Q_W >= 0 at finite lambda is a tautology
decisions.rationale: Max eigenvalue of M on null(W02) is exactly zero — the ~1e-8 was quadrature error converging O(1/n^2) to 0. The Weil explicit formula is an exact identity, not an approximation.

decisions.decision: Five approaches killed: M_diag domination, tropical lift, zero-free region, Toeplitz, spectral
decisions.rationale: Negativity requires exact weights, all prime powers, perfect cancellation. Any approximation breaks the sign. The primes aren't conspiring roughly — they're an exact identity.

decisions.decision: Spectrum splits into seeing modes (genuinely negative, ~14 eigenvalues) and silent modes (exactly zero, ~46 eigenvalues)
decisions.rationale: Seeing modes have nonzero Mellin transform at zeta zeros. Silent modes have zero Mellin transform. No mode is ever positive.

decisions.decision: RH is about strong operator convergence, not finite-lambda positivity
decisions.rationale: Finite-lambda Q_W is always PSD (tautology). RH = whether the limit as lambda->infinity is PSD. This is the passage from algebra to analysis.

next_action: Pure analysis: formalize the strong operator convergence statement, read CCM 2023/2024 papers, attempt specific lemmas. Computation is complete — the problem is now a theorem in functional analysis.
context_notes: Sessions 35-37 killed 5 computational approaches and discovered that Q_W>=0 at finite lambda is a tautology of the Weil explicit formula. The max eigenvalue on null(W02) is identically zero (quadrature error O(1/n^2)). The spectrum has two populations: ~14 genuinely negative eigenvalues (modes seeing zeta zeros) and ~46 exactly zero (silent modes). The Slepian transition is invisible. RH lives in the infinite-dimensional limit: strong operator convergence of the prime-side Weil distribution on Sonin space as lambda->infinity. This is the Connes-Consani-Moscovici program (2023/2024). The remaining step is pure analysis, not computation. Grok (xAI) was a collaborator via 'vision quest' dispatches — provided the Sonin space / prolate connection that led to the tautology discovery, but also produced handwaved 'proofs' that don't hold up. Key files: session35_*.py, session36_*.py, session37_*.py.
